title: TerraCraft:Confluence
description: Lightweight modpack to enjoy the content of Terraria in Minecraft 1.21.1, with mod Confluence:Otherworld.
body:
# TerraCraft:Confluence

*Thanks to the release of [Confluence: Otherworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/confluence) !!!*

### Lightweight modpack based on Confluence: Otherworld.

Includes some performance optimizations and functional mods, and the art style has been designed to fit the Terraria style!

**Mods included:**

- sodium
  
- Sophisticated Storage
  
- Sophisticated Backpacks
  
- Map Atlases
  
- Jade
  
- Iris
  
- Better Combat (Compatible with Confluence: Otherworld)
  
- WayStones
  
- You're in Grave Danger
  
- Tom's Simple Storage
  
- Create
  
- And more...
